rules_added.rule: Debug caching - WhatsApp aggressively caches. Use Facebook's debug tool.
Draw from IDE themes and cultural aesthetics for inspiration

rules_added.rule: Pre-Delivery Checklist: before shipping any UI — no emojis as icons (use SVG: Heroicons/Lucide), cursor-pointer on all clickable elements, hover states with smooth transitions (150-300ms), focus states visible for keyboard navigation, prefers-reduced-motion respected, responsive at 375/768/1024/1440px
rules_added.llm_reasoning: Entirely absent concept in an existing Frontend Design section; a behavioral/accessibility/quality checklist applicable regardless of LLL's playful aesthetic.

rules_added.llm_reasoning: Entirely absent concept in an existing Frontend Design section; quality/accessibility checklist that complements palette's minimalist aesthetic without conflicting with it.

rules_added.rule: Model Routing (subagents) — pass explicit model param on Agent calls; sonnet for execution/search/mechanical, opus for reasoning/planning/review, never haiku for code work
rules_added.llm_reasoning: Direct behavioral instruction applicable regardless of stack; entirely absent concept; cost/quality driver for all subagent use.

rules_added.rule: Automated by hooks — global hooks run pre-commit lint + type-check (pnpm projects), destructive command blocks, branch enforcement, agent model routing; don't duplicate, never bypass with --no-verify
rules_added.llm_reasoning: Universal behavioral instruction tied to globally-installed hooks; tells Claude not to duplicate automated work and forbids bypass shortcuts.
